plugins.name: anja
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin: wiki strutturato + memoria identitaria + ricerca semantica del codice per progetti dev. 78 MCP tool su 15 gruppi (wiki CRUD/maintenance + roadmap + code search hybrid 3-livelli + sessions + memory + skill management + knowledge graph wiki↔code con embedding condiviso + report markdown + visualizer HTML standalone). Provider embedding pluggable: OpenRouter, Voyage AI, OpenAI, local. Auto-summary background + roadmap focus + skill catalog injection al SessionStart + wiki re-embed automatico inline/PostToolUse/SessionEnd. Schema .anjawiki/ wire format pubblico (vedi SCHEMA.md).
